languages.text: "Я из рода Гапрак. Войска Инквизиции уже на подходе. Отдохни перед боем, я посторожу".

traits.locale_text: "Я из рода Гапрак. Войска Инквизиции уже на подходе. Отдохни перед боем, я посторожу".

languages.text: "I'm from House Gaprak. The Inquisition forces are on their way. Rest up before the battle, and I will keep watch."
languages.original_text: "Я из рода Гапрак. Войска Инквизиции уже на подходе. Отдохни перед боем, я посторожу".

traits.locale_text: "I'm from House Gaprak. The Inquisition forces are on their way. Rest up before the battle, and I will keep watch."
"I'm from House Gaprak. The Inquisition forces are on their way. Rest up before the battle, and I will keep watch."
"I'm from House Gaprak. The Inquisition forces are on their way. Rest up before the battle, and I will keep watch."

languages.text: “我是贾帕克家族的人。审判庭的部队就要到了。趁战斗还没开始，你们先去休息会儿，这里我来盯着。”
languages.original_text: "I'm from House Gaprak. The Inquisition forces are on their way. Rest up before the battle, and I will keep watch."

traits.locale_text: “我是贾帕克家族的人。审判庭的部队就要到了。趁战斗还没开始，你们先去休息会儿，这里我来盯着。”

languages.text: « Je suis de la maison Gaprak. Les forces de l'Inquisition sont en route. Reposez-vous avant la bataille, je vais monter la garde à votre place. »
languages.original_text: "I'm from House Gaprak. The Inquisition forces are on their way. Rest up before the battle, and I will keep watch."

traits.locale_text: « Je suis de la maison Gaprak. Les forces de l'Inquisition sont en route. Reposez-vous avant la bataille, je vais monter la garde à votre place. »

languages.text: "Ben Gaprak Hanesi'ndenim. Engizisyon kuvvetleri yolda. Savaştan önce dinlen, ben nöbet tutarım."
languages.original_text: "I'm from House Gaprak. The Inquisition forces are on their way. Rest up before the battle, and I will keep watch."

traits.locale_text: "Ben Gaprak Hanesi'ndenim. Engizisyon kuvvetleri yolda. Savaştan önce dinlen, ben nöbet tutarım."

languages.text: «Soy de la casa Gaprak. Las fuerzas de la Inquisición están de camino. Descanse antes de la batalla mientras yo vigilo».
languages.original_text: "I'm from House Gaprak. The Inquisition forces are on their way. Rest up before the battle, and I will keep watch."

traits.locale_text: «Soy de la casa Gaprak. Las fuerzas de la Inquisición están de camino. Descanse antes de la batalla mientras yo vigilo».

languages.text: "Ich gehöre zu Haus Gaprak. Die Truppen der Inquisition sind unterwegs. Ruht Euch vor der Schlacht aus, während ich Wache halte."
languages.original_text: "I'm from House Gaprak. The Inquisition forces are on their way. Rest up before the battle, and I will keep watch."

traits.locale_text: "Ich gehöre zu Haus Gaprak. Die Truppen der Inquisition sind unterwegs. Ruht Euch vor der Schlacht aus, während ich Wache halte."

languages.text: 「私はハウス・ガプラクから来た。宗教裁判の軍勢が来る。戦いの前に休んで、私は番をする。」
languages.original_text: "I'm from House Gaprak. The Inquisition forces are on their way. Rest up before the battle, and I will keep watch."

traits.locale_text: 「私はハウス・ガプラクから来た。宗教裁判の軍勢が来る。戦いの前に休んで、私は番をする。」
